Notice Of Hearing On Defts Motion To Stay Proceedings Pending Arbitration Of Related Case
Off Calendar Jul-22-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS HARRY LOW, AND, BAY CITY VIEW LLC Motion to Stay Proceedings Pending Arbitration of Related Case. Appearances: William L. Coggshall, of Archer Norris (925) 930-6600, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Anna M. Hertzman, Esq. of McInerney & Dillon, (510) 465-7100 appearing for Defendants and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: MOTION TO STAY GRANTED. THIS CASE AND CASE #481417 CONCERN CONSTRUCTION WORK ON THE SAME PROJECT AND INVOLVE RELATED ISSUES. THIS CASE IS STAYED PENDING THE OUTCOME OF THE ARBITRATION IN CASE #481417. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
